title: Kom sit aan my tafel: 'n Reis na 'n nalatenskap van orde
description: SAKENUUS - Ons almal gaan eendag sterf. Die...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

SAKENUUS - Ons almal gaan eendag sterf. Die vraag is: gaan jy chaos nalaat, of orde?

Met “Kom sit aan my tafel” nooi ek jou uit op ’n unieke 10-weke reis waar ons saam stap vir stap jou persoonlike “In Liefdevolle Orde-” lêer gaan bou.


> Elke week hanteer ons ’n nuwe afdeling, met praktiese antwoorde en leiding wat jy dadelik kan toepas.


Afdeling 1 begin met die bymekaarmaak van jou persoonlike dokumente – die fondasie van jou lêer.

Laai die afdelingsindeks gratis af by www.roosinc.co.za om jou lêer saam met my te begin bou.

Luister elke Dinsdag vanaf 23 September tot 2 Desember saam om 15:40 op Eden FM waar ek oor die week se afdeling gesels en jou help bou aan jou eie “In Liefdevolle Orde”-lêer.

Ná 10 weke gaan jy nie net ’n lêer vol dokumente hê nie – maar bemagtig wees om liefdevolle orde vir jou dierbares na te laat.

RoosInc bied ook die opstel of nagaan van jou testament gratis aan - kontak ons gerus vir ‘n afspraak by 044 050 1874.

GroeteAlta RoosDirekteur en Boedelspesialis van RoosInc prokureurs

COME SIT AT MY TABLEA journey to a legacy of orderWe will all die one day. The question is: will you leave behind chaos, or order?With “Come sit at my table” I invite you on a unique 10-week journey where we will build your personal “In Loving Order” file, step by step.Each week we will cover a new section, with practical answers and guidance you can apply immediately.Section 1 starts with gathering your personal documents – the foundation of your file.Download the index for each section free on www.roosinc.co.za to start building your file with me.Tune in on Eden FM every Tuesday from 23 September to 2 December at 15:40, where I’ll be talking through the week’s section and assisting you in building your own “In Loving Order” file.After 10 weeks, you won’t just have a file full of documents, but will be empowered to leave loving order to your loved ones.RoosInc also offers the drafting or review of your will, free of charge. You can contact us for an appointment on 044 050 1874.RegardsAlta RoosDirector and Deceased Estate Specialist at RoosInc attorneys

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’

A journey to a legacy of order

We will all die one day. The question is: will you leave behind chaos, or order?

With “Come sit at my table” I invite you on a unique 10-week journey where we will build your personal “In Loving Order” file, step by step.

Each week we will cover a new section, with practical answers and guidance you can apply immediately.

Section 1 starts with gathering your personal documents – the foundation of your file.

Download the index for each section free on www.roosinc.co.za to start building your file with me.

Tune in on Eden FM every Tuesday from 23 September to 2 December at 15:40, where I’ll be talking through the week’s section and assisting you in building your own “In Loving Order” file.

After 10 weeks, you won’t just have a file full of documents, but will be empowered to leave loving order to your loved ones.

RoosInc also offers the drafting or review of your will, free of charge. You can contact us for an appointment on 044 050 1874.

Regards
Alta Roos
